title: helianthemum guttatum subsp. variabile
intro: Helianthemum guttatum subsp. variabile, also known as Rock Rose or Herb-Robert, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Cistaceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as improved wound healing, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Helianthemum guttatum subsp. variabile can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
